text: Build Echo MVP: Stripe payment + user auth + delivery
description:
Revenue implementation for Echo service (journal → video)

Tiers from product-design.md:
- Spark (Free): 1 Echo/month, watermarked, SD
- Flame ($19/mo): 4 Echos/month, HD
- Blaze ($49/mo): 15 Echos/month, voice clone

Implementation: ~60 hours
- Stripe Checkout + subscription webhooks
- User authentication (email/password or OAuth)
- User dashboard (upload journal → receive video)
- Usage metering + quota enforcement
- Email delivery system
- Landing page

This converts the content engine into revenue.
